com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IAgentAdminConnection


  • public interface IAgentAdminConnection
    Service for administering server clusters and infobases of the 1C:Enterprise 8 platform.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addAuthentication(UUID clusterId, String name, String pwd)
      Authethicates an infobase administrator
      void applyAssignmentRules(UUID clusterId, int full)
      Applies assignment rules.
      void authenticate(UUID clusterId, String name, String pwd)
      Authethicates a server cluster administrator
      void authenticateAgent(String name, String pwd)
      Authethicates a central server administrator
      void clearResourceConsumptionCounterAccumulatedValues(UUID clusterId, String counterName, String object)
      Deletes a resource counter values
      Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
      UUID createInfoBase(UUID clusterId, IInfoBaseInfo info, int mode)
      Creates an infobase in a cluster.
      void createSecurityProfile(UUID clusterId, ISecurityProfile profile)
      Creates or updates a cluster security profile.
      void createSecurityProfileAddIn(UUID clusterId, ISecurityProfileAddIn addIn)
      Creates or updates an allowed add-in of a security profile.
      void createSecurityProfileApplication(UUID clusterId, ISecurityProfileApplication app)
      Creates or updates an allowed application of a security profile.
      void createSecurityProfileComClass(UUID clusterId, ISecurityProfileCOMClass comClass)
      Creates or updates an allowed COM class of a security profile.
      void createSecurityProfileInternetResource(UUID clusterId, ISecurityProfileInternetResource resource)
      Creates or updates an Internet resource of a security profile.
      void createSecurityProfileUnsafeExternalModule(UUID clusterId, ISecurityProfileExternalModule module)
      Creates or updates an allowed unsafe external module of a security profile.
      void createSecurityProfileVirtualDirectory(UUID clusterId, ISecurityProfileVirtualDirectory directory)
      Creates or updates a virtual directory of a security profile.
      void disconnect(UUID clusterId, UUID processId, UUID connectionId)
      Closes an infobase connection.
      void dropInfoBase(UUID clusterId, UUID infobaseId, int mode)
      Deletes an infobase.
      void dropSecurityProfile(UUID clusterId, String spName)
      Deletes a security profile.
      void dropSecurityProfileAddIn(UUID clusterId, String spName, String name)
      Deletes an allowed add-in of a security profile.
      void dropSecurityProfileApplication(UUID clusterId, String spName, String name)
      Deletes an allowed application of a security profile.
      void dropSecurityProfileComClass(UUID clusterId, String spName, String name)
      Deletes an allowed COM class of a security profile.
      void dropSecurityProfileInternetResource(UUID clusterId, String spName, String name)
      Deletes an Internet resource of a security profile.
      void dropSecurityProfileUnsafeExternalModule(UUID clusterId, String spName, String name)
      Deletes an allowed unsafe external module of a security profile.
      void dropSecurityProfileVirtualDirectory(UUID clusterId, String spName, String alias)
      Deletes a virtual directory of a security profile.
      List<IRegUserInfo> getAgentAdmins()
      Gets the list of central server administrators.
      String getAgentVersion()
      Gets the central server version
      IAssignmentRuleInfo getAssignmentRuleInfo(UUID clusterId, UUID serverId, UUID ruleId)
      Gets an assignment rule description.
      List<IAssignmentRuleInfo> getAssignmentRules(UUID clusterId, UUID serverId)
      Gets the list of descriptions of working server assignment rules.
      List<IRegUserInfo> getClusterAdmins(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of cluster administrators.
      IClusterInfo getClusterInfo(UUID clusterId)
      Gets a cluster description
      IClusterManagerInfo getClusterManagerInfo(UUID clusterId, UUID managerId)
      Gets a cluster manager description.
      List<IClusterManagerInfo> getClusterManagers(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of cluster manager descriptions.
      List<IClusterInfo> getClusters()
      Gets the list of cluster descriptions registered on the central server
      List<IClusterServiceInfo> getClusterServices(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of cluster service descriptions.
      IInfoBaseConnectionShort getConnectionInfoShort(UUID clusterId, UUID connectionId)
      Gets a short description of a connection.
      List<IObjectLockInfo> getConnectionLocks(UUID clusterId, UUID connectionId)
      Gets the list of connection object locks.
      List<IInfoBaseConnectionShort> getConnectionsShort(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of short descriptions of cluster connections.
      List<IInfoBaseConnectionInfo> getInfoBaseConnections(UUID clusterId, UUID processId, UUID infobaseId)
      Gets the list of infobase connection descriptions for a working process.
      List<IInfoBaseConnectionShort> getInfoBaseConnectionsShort(UUID clusterId, UUID infobaseId)
      Gets the list of short descriptions of infobase connections.
      IInfoBaseInfo getInfoBaseInfo(UUID clusterId, UUID infobaseId)
      Gets a full infobase description.
      List<IObjectLockInfo> getInfoBaseLocks(UUID clusterId, UUID infobaseId)
      Gets the list of infobase object locks.
      List<IInfoBaseInfo> getInfoBases(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of full descriptions of infobases registered in the cluster.
      List<ISessionInfo> getInfoBaseSessions(UUID clusterId, UUID infobaseId)
      Gets the list of infobase session descriptions.
      IInfoBaseInfoShort getInfoBaseShortInfo(UUID clusterId, UUID infobaseId)
      Gets a short infobase description.
      List<IInfoBaseInfoShort> getInfoBasesShort(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of short descriptions of infobases registered in the cluster.
      List<IObjectLockInfo> getLocks(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of object locks.
      List<IResourceConsumptionCounterValue> getResourceConsumptionCounterAccumulatedValues(UUID clusterId, String counterName, String object)
      Gets the list of resource counter accumulated values
      Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
      IResourceConsumptionCounter getResourceConsumptionCounterInfo(UUID clusterId, String counterName)
      Gets resource counters description.
      List<IResourceConsumptionCounter> getResourceConsumptionCounters(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of resource counters.
      List<IResourceConsumptionCounterValue> getResourceConsumptionCounterValues(UUID clusterId, String counterName, String object)
      Gets the list of resource counter values
      Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
      IResourceConsumptionLimit getResourceConsumptionLimitInfo(UUID clusterId, String limitName)
      Gets resource limits description
      Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
      List<IResourceConsumptionLimit> getResourceConsumptionLimits(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of resource limits.
      List<ISecurityProfileAddIn> getSecurityProfileAddIns(UUID clusterId, String spName)
      Gets the list of allowed add-ins of a security profile.
      List<ISecurityProfileApplication> getSecurityProfileApplications(UUID clusterId, String spName)
      Gets the list of allowed applications of a security profile.
      List<ISecurityProfileCOMClass> getSecurityProfileComClasses(UUID clusterId, String spName)
      Gets the list of allowed COM classes of a security profile.
      List<ISecurityProfileInternetResource> getSecurityProfileInternetResources(UUID clusterId, String spName)
      Gets the list of Internet resources of a security profile.
      List<ISecurityProfile> getSecurityProfiles(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of cluster security profiles.
      List<ISecurityProfileExternalModule> getSecurityProfileUnsafeExternalModules(UUID clusterId, String spName)
      Gets the list of allowed unsafe external modules of a security profile.
      List<ISecurityProfileVirtualDirectory> getSecurityProfileVirtualDirectories(UUID clusterId, String spName)
      Gets the list of virtual directories of a security profile.
      List<IWorkingProcessInfo> getServerWorkingProcesses(UUID clusterId, UUID serverId)
      Gets the list of descriptions of working processes of a working server.
      ISessionInfo getSessionInfo(UUID clusterId, UUID sid)
      Gets a session description.
      List<IObjectLockInfo> getSessionLocks(UUID clusterId, UUID infobaseId, UUID sid)
      Gets the list of session object locks.
      List<ISessionInfo> getSessions(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of cluster session descriptions.
      List<IWorkingProcessInfo> getWorkingProcesses(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of descriptions of working processes registered in the cluster.
      IWorkingProcessInfo getWorkingProcessInfo(UUID clusterId, UUID processId)
      Gets a working server description.
      IWorkingServerInfo getWorkingServerInfo(UUID clusterId, UUID serverId)
      Gets a description of a working server registered in the cluster.
      List<IWorkingServerInfo> getWorkingServers(UUID clusterId)
      Gets the list of descriptions of working servers registered in the cluster.
      void interruptCurrentServerCall(UUID clusterId, UUID sid, String message)
      Interrupt current server call.
      void regAgentAdmin(IRegUserInfo user)
      Creates a central server administrator or changes the parameters of an existing one.
      UUID regAssignmentRule(UUID clusterId, UUID serverId, IAssignmentRuleInfo info, int position)
      Creates an assignment rule, changes an existing one, or moves an existing rule to a new position.
      UUID regCluster(IClusterInfo info)
      Creates a cluster or changes the state of an existing one.
      void regClusterAdmin(UUID clusterId, IRegUserInfo user)
      Creates a cluster administrator or changes the parameters of an existing one.
      void regResourceConsumptionCounter(UUID clusterId, IResourceConsumptionCounter counter)
      Creates or updates a resource counter.
      void regResourceConsumptionLimit(UUID clusterId, IResourceConsumptionLimit limit)
      Creates or updates a resource limit.
      UUID regWorkingServer(UUID clusterId, IWorkingServerInfo info)
      Creates a working server or changes the description of an existing one.
      void terminateSession(UUID clusterId, UUID sid)
      Terminates a session.
      void terminateSession(UUID clusterId, UUID sid, String message)
      Terminates a session.
      void unregAgentAdmin(String name)
      Deletes a central server administrator.
      void unregAssignmentRule(UUID clusterId, UUID serverId, UUID ruleId)
      Deletes an assignment rule from the list of working server rules.
      void unregCluster(UUID clusterId)
      Deletes a cluster.
      void unregClusterAdmin(UUID clusterId, String name)
      Deletes a cluster administrator.
      void unregResourceConsumptionCounter(UUID clusterId, String counterName)
      Deletes a resource counter
      Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
      void unregResourceConsumptionLimit(UUID clusterId, String limitName)
      Deletes a resource limits
      Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
      void unregWorkingServer(UUID clusterId, UUID serverId)
      Deletes a working server and removes its cluster registration.
      void updateInfoBase(UUID clusterId, IInfoBaseInfo info)
      Changes infobase parameters.
      void updateInfoBaseShort(UUID clusterId, IInfoBaseInfoShort info)
      Changes short infobase description.

    • Method Detail

      • authenticateAgent

        void authenticateAgent(String name,
                       String pwd)
        Authethicates a central server administrator
        Parameters:
        name - administrator name
        pwd - administrator password
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • authenticate

        void authenticate(UUID clusterId,
                  String name,
                  String pwd)
        Authethicates a server cluster administrator
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        name - administrator name
        pwd - administrator password
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • addAuthentication

        void addAuthentication(UUID clusterId,
                       String name,
                       String pwd)
        Authethicates an infobase administrator
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        name - administrator name
        pwd - administrator password
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getAgentAdmins

        List<IRegUserInfo> getAgentAdmins()
        Gets the list of central server administrators.
        Central server authentication is required: authenticateAgent(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Returns:
        list of central server administrators
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getClusterAdmins

        List<IRegUserInfo> getClusterAdmins(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of cluster administrators.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of cluster administrators
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • regAgentAdmin

        void regAgentAdmin(IRegUserInfo user)
        Creates a central server administrator or changes the parameters of an existing one. If the administrator with the specified name is absent from the list of central server administrators, a new central server administrator is created.
        Central server authentication is required: authenticateAgent(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        user - administrator info
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • regClusterAdmin

        void regClusterAdmin(UUID clusterId,
                     IRegUserInfo user)
        Creates a cluster administrator or changes the parameters of an existing one. If the administrator with the specified name is absent from the list of cluster administrators, a new cluster administrator is created.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        user - administrator info
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • unregAgentAdmin

        void unregAgentAdmin(String name)
        Deletes a central server administrator.
        Central server authentication is required: authenticateAgent(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        name - administrator name
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • unregClusterAdmin

        void unregClusterAdmin(UUID clusterId,
                       String name)
        Deletes a cluster administrator.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        name - administrator name
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getClusters

        List<IClusterInfo> getClusters()
        Gets the list of cluster descriptions registered on the central server
        Returns:
        list of descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getClusterInfo

        IClusterInfo getClusterInfo(UUID clusterId)
        Gets a cluster description
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        cluster description, or null if the cluster with the specified ID is not registered on the central server
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • regCluster

        UUID regCluster(IClusterInfo info)
        Creates a cluster or changes the state of an existing one.
        Central server authentication is required: authenticateAgent(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        info - cluster description
        Returns:
        ID of the created cluster, or null if the description of an existing cluster was changed.
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • unregCluster

        void unregCluster(UUID clusterId)
        Deletes a cluster.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getClusterManagers

        List<IClusterManagerInfo> getClusterManagers(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of cluster manager descriptions.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of cluster manager descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getClusterManagerInfo

        IClusterManagerInfo getClusterManagerInfo(UUID clusterId,
                                          UUID managerId)
        Gets a cluster manager description.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        managerId - manager ID
        Returns:
        cluster manager description, or null if the manager with the specified ID does not exist
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getWorkingServers

        List<IWorkingServerInfo> getWorkingServers(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of descriptions of working servers registered in the cluster.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of working server descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getWorkingServerInfo

        IWorkingServerInfo getWorkingServerInfo(UUID clusterId,
                                        UUID serverId)
        Gets a description of a working server registered in the cluster.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        serverId - working server ID
        Returns:
        working server description, or null if the working server with the specified ID does not exist
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • regWorkingServer

        UUID regWorkingServer(UUID clusterId,
                      IWorkingServerInfo info)
        Creates a working server or changes the description of an existing one.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        info - working server description
        Returns:
        ID of the created working server, or null if the description of an existing working server was changed.
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • unregWorkingServer

        void unregWorkingServer(UUID clusterId,
                        UUID serverId)
        Deletes a working server and removes its cluster registration.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        serverId - working server ID
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getWorkingProcesses

        List<IWorkingProcessInfo> getWorkingProcesses(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of descriptions of working processes registered in the cluster.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of working server descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getWorkingProcessInfo

        IWorkingProcessInfo getWorkingProcessInfo(UUID clusterId,
                                          UUID processId)
        Gets a working server description.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        processId - working process ID
        Returns:
        working process description, or null if the working process with the specified ID does not exist
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getServerWorkingProcesses

        List<IWorkingProcessInfo> getServerWorkingProcesses(UUID clusterId,
                                                    UUID serverId)
        Gets the list of descriptions of working processes of a working server.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        serverId - working server ID
        Returns:
        list of working process descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getClusterServices

        List<IClusterServiceInfo> getClusterServices(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of cluster service descriptions.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of cluster service descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • createInfoBase

        UUID createInfoBase(UUID clusterId,
                    IInfoBaseInfo info,
                    int mode)
        Creates an infobase in a cluster.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        info - infobase description
        mode - infobase creation mode:
        • 0 - do not create a database
        • 1 - create a database
        Returns:
        ID of the created infobase
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • updateInfoBaseShort

        void updateInfoBaseShort(UUID clusterId,
                         IInfoBaseInfoShort info)
        Changes short infobase description.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        info - short infobase description
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • updateInfoBase

        void updateInfoBase(UUID clusterId,
                    IInfoBaseInfo info)
        Changes infobase parameters.
        Infobase authentication is required: addAuthentication(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        info - infobase description
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • dropInfoBase

        void dropInfoBase(UUID clusterId,
                  UUID infobaseId,
                  int mode)
        Deletes an infobase.
        Infobase authentication is required: addAuthentication(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        mode - infobase creation mode:
        • 0 - do not delete the database
        • 1 - delete the database
        • 2 - clear the database
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBasesShort

        List<IInfoBaseInfoShort> getInfoBasesShort(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of short descriptions of infobases registered in the cluster.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of short infobase descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBases

        List<IInfoBaseInfo> getInfoBases(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of full descriptions of infobases registered in the cluster.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        For each infobase in the cluster, infobase authentication is required: addAuthentication(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        If infobase authentication is not performed, only fields that correspond to short infobase description fields will be filled.
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of full infobase descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBaseShortInfo

        IInfoBaseInfoShort getInfoBaseShortInfo(UUID clusterId,
                                        UUID infobaseId)
        Gets a short infobase description.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        Returns:
        short infobase description
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBaseInfo

        IInfoBaseInfo getInfoBaseInfo(UUID clusterId,
                              UUID infobaseId)
        Gets a full infobase description.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Infobase authentication is required: addAuthentication(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        Returns:
        full infobase description
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getConnectionsShort

        List<IInfoBaseConnectionShort> getConnectionsShort(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of short descriptions of cluster connections.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of short cluster connection descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBaseConnectionsShort

        List<IInfoBaseConnectionShort> getInfoBaseConnectionsShort(UUID clusterId,
                                                           UUID infobaseId)
        Gets the list of short descriptions of infobase connections.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        Returns:
        list of short infobase connection descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getConnectionInfoShort

        IInfoBaseConnectionShort getConnectionInfoShort(UUID clusterId,
                                                UUID connectionId)
        Gets a short description of a connection.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        connectionId - connection ID
        Returns:
        short connection description
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBaseConnections

        List<IInfoBaseConnectionInfo> getInfoBaseConnections(UUID clusterId,
                                                     UUID processId,
                                                     UUID infobaseId)
        Gets the list of infobase connection descriptions for a working process.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Infobase authentication is required: addAuthentication(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        processId - working process ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        Returns:
        list of infobase connection descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • disconnect

        void disconnect(UUID clusterId,
                UUID processId,
                UUID connectionId)
        Closes an infobase connection.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Infobase authentication is required: addAuthentication(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        processId - working process ID
        connectionId - connection ID
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getSessions

        List<ISessionInfo> getSessions(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of cluster session descriptions.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of session descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBaseSessions

        List<ISessionInfo> getInfoBaseSessions(UUID clusterId,
                                       UUID infobaseId)
        Gets the list of infobase session descriptions.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        Returns:
        list of session descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getSessionInfo

        ISessionInfo getSessionInfo(UUID clusterId,
                            UUID sid)
        Gets a session description.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        sid - session ID
        Returns:
        session description
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • terminateSession

        void terminateSession(UUID clusterId,
                      UUID sid)
        Terminates a session.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        sid - session ID
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • terminateSession

        void terminateSession(UUID clusterId,
                      UUID sid,
                      String message)
        Terminates a session.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        sid - session ID
        message - error message for user
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getLocks

        List<IObjectLockInfo> getLocks(UUID clusterId)
        Gets the list of object locks.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        Returns:
        list of object lock descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getInfoBaseLocks

        List<IObjectLockInfo> getInfoBaseLocks(UUID clusterId,
                                       UUID infobaseId)
        Gets the list of infobase object locks.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        Returns:
        list of object lock descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getConnectionLocks

        List<IObjectLockInfo> getConnectionLocks(UUID clusterId,
                                         UUID connectionId)
        Gets the list of connection object locks.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        connectionId - connection ID
        Returns:
        list of object lock descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getSessionLocks

        List<IObjectLockInfo> getSessionLocks(UUID clusterId,
                                      UUID infobaseId,
                                      UUID sid)
        Gets the list of session object locks.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        infobaseId - infobase ID
        sid - session ID
        Returns:
        list of object lock descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • applyAssignmentRules

        void applyAssignmentRules(UUID clusterId,
                          int full)
        Applies assignment rules.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        full - assigment rule application mode:
        • 0 - partial
        • 1 - full
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getAssignmentRules

        List<IAssignmentRuleInfo> getAssignmentRules(UUID clusterId,
                                             UUID serverId)
        Gets the list of descriptions of working server assignment rules.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        serverId - working server ID
        Returns:
        list of assignment rule descriptions
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • regAssignmentRule

        UUID regAssignmentRule(UUID clusterId,
                       UUID serverId,
                       IAssignmentRuleInfo info,
                       int position)
        Creates an assignment rule, changes an existing one, or moves an existing rule to a new position.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        serverId - working server ID
        info - assignment rule description
        position - position in the rule list (starts from 0)
        Returns:
        ID of the created rule, or null if an existing assignment rule was changed
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • unregAssignmentRule

        void unregAssignmentRule(UUID clusterId,
                         UUID serverId,
                         UUID ruleId)
        Deletes an assignment rule from the list of working server rules.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        serverId - working server ID
        ruleId - assignment rule ID
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • getAssignmentRuleInfo

        IAssignmentRuleInfo getAssignmentRuleInfo(UUID clusterId,
                                          UUID serverId,
                                          UUID ruleId)
        Gets an assignment rule description.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        serverId - working server ID
        ruleId - assignment rule ID
        Returns:
        assignment rule description
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

        Returns:
        list of cluster security profiles

                           ISecurityProfile profile)

        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        profile - security profile
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

      • dropSecurityProfile

                         String spName)
        Deletes a security profile.
        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        spName - security profile name
        Throws:
        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

                                           ISecurityProfileVirtualDirectory directory)

        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        directory - virtual directory

        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.

                                         String spName,
                                         String alias)

        Cluster authentication is required: authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)
        Parameters:
        clusterId - cluster ID
        spName - security profile name
        alias - virtual directory alias

        counterName - resource counter name

      • getAgentVersion

        Returns:
        version of central server

        AgentAdminException - in the case of errors.
